creator: takuya.harada.jp.oss@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 200352
portsnap log

portsnap server ec2-ap-northeast-1.portsnap.freebsd.org doesn't work.
portsnap log is described below:
Script started on Sat Dec 22 14:38:23 2018
Command: portsnap fetch update
Looking up portsnap.FreeBSD.org mirrors... 6 mirrors found.
Fetching snapshot tag from ec2-ap-northeast-1.portsnap.freebsd.org... done.
Latest snapshot on server is older than what we already have!
Cowardly refusing to downgrade from Sat Dec 22 06:14:12 JST 2018
to Tue Dec 18 01:45:50 JST 2018.

Command exit status: 1
Script done on Sat Dec 22 14:38:24 2018

Thanks,
Takuya Harada
